---
id: get-grid-point-data
title: "Get grid point data for a date"
description: "Returns all grid point data observations for the named market index on the given as-of date."
sidebar_label: "Get grid point data for a date"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get grid point data for a date"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/indexes/{name}/data"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all grid point data observations for the named market index on the given as-of date.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
